scripts.build: node -e "const cmd = process.env.VERCEL ? 'npm run build --workspace=frontend' : 'npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend'; require('child_process').execSync(cmd, {stdio: 'inherit'});"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (!process.env.VERCEL && !process.env.CI) { try { require('child_process').execSync('npm run setup --workspace=backend', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } catch(e) { process.exit(0); } }"
